retrieved_result: What do you call a rap song with no lyrics (instrumental)? What genre does this fit into? "Lou Lint, Listening to all genres of music since 1984Answered Jan 29, 2018 · Author has 963 answers and 493k answer views First of all, let’s differentiate Rap and Hip Hop. Hip Hop is usually used to describe the culture itself whereas Rap is used to describe the act of ‘rapping’ words over a beat.
